title: alchemilla vulgaris var. glabra
intro: Alchemilla vulgaris var. glabra, also known as smooth lady's mantle, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Rosaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of smooth lady's mantle include soothing digestive problems, reducing menstrual cramps, and alleviating skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
